sections.sectionTitle: Moab Gamah Israel-te tawh Topa' Thuciamna

verses.text: Hihte pen, Horeb-ah amaute tawh thuciamna a bawlsa banah, Israel mite tawh Moab gamah thuciamna a bawl dingin Topa in Moses a sawl, a thuciamna kammalte ahi hi
Moses in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Egypt gamsung note' mit muhah, Topa in Faro' tung leh ama nasemte khempeuh leh ama gam khempeuhah a bawlna
note' mit in a muhsa ze-etna lianpite, limte, tua na lamdang liante khempeuh na thei khin uh hi
Ahih hangin tuni dongin Topa in note' tungah a thu na telna ding uh lungsim hita leh, na muhna ding uh mit hita leh, na zakna ding uh bil hita leh hong pia nailo hi
Kum sawmli sung sehnel gamah note hong makaih khin hi. Note' tung panin na puante uh sia nailo a, na khe panun zong na khedapte uh sia nailo hi
Topa pen na Pasian uh ahihna na theihna dingun nek ding anlum, leh dawn ding leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin na ne nai kei uh a, ahi zongin na kisapna teng uh hong pia hi
Hih mun na tun' uh ciangin Heshbon kumpipa Sihon leh Bashan kumpipa Og, eite a do dingin hong kuankhia uh a, ahih hangin amaute i zo hi
Amaute' leitang i la a, Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte tungah luah dingin i pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin na hihna khempeuh uhah na daupai theihna dingun hih thuciamna kammalte khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi

“ Topa na Pasian un tuni-in note tawh a bawl, Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna sungah na lut theihna dingun, tuni-in amah in ama mi dingin note hong kipsak theihna ding, leh note' tungah hong ciamna leh na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tungah a kiciamna bangin, amah, note' Pasian ahih theihna dingin, na minam lutangte uh, na upate uh, na uliante uh, Israel mi pasal khempeuh, na taneute uh, na zite uh, na giahphual uhah a om peemtate, na sing uh hong tomsakin na tui uh a hong tawisakte-a kipan note khempeuh, tuni-in Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na ding uh hi
Hih kiciamna note bek tawh a bawl hilo a
tuni-in eite tawh Topa i Pasian' mai-ah a ding mite tawh a bawl mah bangin tuni-in eite tawh a om nailo i suan i khakte tawh zong a bawl ahi hi
“Egypt gamah i ten'na leh note in na nawk uh minamte lakah i paina na thei uh hi
A muhdahhuai amau' na, singlesuang a kibawl, ngunlekham a kibawl, amaute' lakah a om a milimte uh na mu khin uh hi

Note lakah numei ahi a, pasal ahi a, innkuan ahi a, minam khat ahi zongin, tua minamte' pasian a bia dingin Topa i Pasian kiang panin tuni-in a lungsim a heikhia a omkhak ding kidawm un. Tua hi kei leh note lakah gu a nei gah kha a gah singkung hong bang ding a, hih kiciamna kammalte za napi-in a lungsimah amah thupha kipia tawmin, ‘Ka lungsim khauhna tawh ka gamta zongin ka suakta veve ding hi,’ a ci hong om khading hi. Hih in mihoih leh misia, a kibangin phiatkhiatna hong suaksak ding hi

Topa in amah maisaklo ding a, Topa' hehna leh hazatna meikhu bangin tua mipa' langkhatah khuzaw-in, hih laibu sunga kigelh samsiatnate ama tungah tu ding a, Topa in a mun khempeuh panin ama min phiat ding hi
Topa in hih thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thuciam samsiatnate khempeuh tawh kizui-in gimna a thuak dingin Israel minamte khempeuh lak panin amah tengkhia ding hi
“Hong khanglai ding, note' nungah hong piang na tate uh, leh a gamla gam panin a hong pai gamdang mite in, tua gam' gimngahna leh Topa in a natsak cinatnate a muh uh ciangin

‘A gambup pen kaat leh ci, leh nin a kangtum, khai kituhlo, bangmah polo, lopa zong a po zawhlohna mun Sodom leh Gomorrah, Admah leh Zeboiim bangin a kilawnthal gawp, a hehna leh a sinsona tawh Topa' lotgawpte tawh kibang hi,’ ci ding uh hi
Minam khempeuhte in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih bangin hih gam bawl ahi hiam? Hih hehna lian, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci takpi ding uh hi
Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Amah in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih lai-in amaute tawh a bawl, a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa' thuciamna amaute in nusia-in
a theih nailoh uh pasian-te leh amah in amaute tungah a piakloh pasian dangte' na va semin a biakna hang uh ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin a mite tungah Topa heh mahmah a, hih laibu sunga om samsiatnate khempeuh hih leitungah tungsak hi
Topa in hehna, sinsona, lungham mahmahna tawh a leitang panun amaute zunglot a, tuni-a i muh bangin amaute gamdangah hawlkhia hi,’ ci ding uh hi
“ Topa i Pasian in hong lahkhiat loh thusim om a, ahih hangin hih thukham sunga om thute khempeuh i zuih theihna dingin hong lakkhia a, eite leh i suan i khakte' zuih tawntung ding ahi hi.
